name: hokusai
description: Interact with the RIKEN HOKUSAI BigWaterfall2 (HBW2) supercomputer: submit and monitor Slurm jobs, manage files on the cluster, and search the official User's Guide.

interface.shortDescription: Submit and monitor HBW2 Slurm jobs and search HOKUSAI docs.
interface.longDescription: Interact with the RIKEN HOKUSAI BigWaterfall2 supercomputer from Codex: submit and monitor Slurm jobs, manage files on the cluster, and search the built-in HBW2 guide.
defaultPrompt: Submit a small HBW2 test job.
